ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country or territory */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country or territory */,
  "code" TEXT /* Three-letter code for the country or territory */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the country belongs to */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government in the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease or condition */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease or condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease or condition */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the disease */,
  "transmission_mode" TEXT /* Mode of transmission of the disease */,
  "prevalence" REAL /* Prevalence rate of the disease */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate of the disease */,
  "treatment_options" TEXT /* Common treatment options for the disease */,
  "preventive_measures" TEXT /* Preventive measures for the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury or cause of death */,
  "injury_name" TEXT /* Name of the injury or cause of death */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the injury or cause of death */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the injury */,
  "common_causes" TEXT /* Common causes of the injury */,
  "prevention_strategies" TEXT /* Strategies to prevent the injury */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "causes_of_death" (
  "cause_of_death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cause of death */,
  "cause_of_death_name" TEXT /* Name of the cause of death */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cause of death */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the cause of death */,
  "prevalence" REAL /* Prevalence rate of the cause of death */,
  "risk_factors" TEXT /* Common risk factors associated with the cause of death */,
  "preventive_measures" TEXT /* Preventive measures to reduce the risk of the cause of death */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_of_death_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country or territory */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the demographic data applies */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country or territory for the given year */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths in the country or territory for the given year */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth */,
  "birth_rate" REAL /* Birth rate per 1,000 population */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Death rate per 1,000 population */,
  "urban_population" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in urban areas */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Literacy rate of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., government, research, international organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_disease_data" (
  "country_disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country-disease entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country or territory */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the data applies */,
  "number_of_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths attributed to the disease in the country or territory for the given year */,
  "incidence_rate" REAL /* Incidence rate of the disease in the country */,
  "prevalence_rate" REAL /* Prevalence rate of the disease in the country */,
  "case_fatality_rate" REAL /* Case fatality rate of the disease in the country */,
  "recovery_rate" REAL /* Recovery rate of the disease in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_disease_data_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_disease_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_injury_data" (
  "country_injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country-injury entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country or territory */,
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the injury */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the data applies */,
  "number_of_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths attributed to the injury in the country or territory for the given year */,
  "incidence_rate" REAL /* Incidence rate of the injury in the country */,
  "prevalence_rate" REAL /* Prevalence rate of the injury in the country */,
  "case_fatality_rate" REAL /* Case fatality rate of the injury in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_injury_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_injury_data_injury_id FOREIGN KEY ("injury_id") REFERENCES injuries ("injury_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_cause_of_death_data" (
  "country_cause_of_death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country-cause of death entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country or territory */,
  "cause_of_death_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cause of death */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the data applies */,
  "number_of_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths attributed to the cause of death in the country or territory for the given year */,
  "incidence_rate" REAL /* Incidence rate of the cause of death in the country */,
  "prevalence_rate" REAL /* Prevalence rate of the cause of death in the country */,
  "case_fatality_rate" REAL /* Case fatality rate of the cause of death in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_cause_of_death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_cause_of_death_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_cause_of_death_data_cause_of_death_id FOREIGN KEY ("cause_of_death_id") REFERENCES causes_of_death ("cause_of_death_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_links" (
  "data_source_link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source link */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "country_disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country-disease data */,
  "country_injury_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country-injury data */,
  "country_cause_of_death_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country-cause of death data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_country_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_disease_id") REFERENCES country_disease_data ("country_disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_country_cause_of_death_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_cause_of_death_id") REFERENCES country_cause_of_death_data ("country_cause_of_death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_country_injury_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_injury_id") REFERENCES country_injury_data ("country_injury_id")
)
